patterns_recognized: Near-zero hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap (|gap| < 0.010) undercuts bullpen-carry thesis even when f5_full_delta is large: CHC@STL (gap=-0.0023, delta=0.294) and SF@COL (gap=-0.003, delta=0.186) both show the model picking via a full-game bullpen flip with negligible actual HL pen advantage — contrast with NYY@OAK (gap=-0.0143) where the gap is real and the thesis holds.

D-grade dual-signal-against (SP xERA AND PQI both opposing pick) applies to 5 games today (LAA@TB, CHC@STL, KC@TEX, SF@COL, ARI@SEA); archive cumulative hit rate ~60% directional failure post-5/25 reset — DOWNGRADE standard applied to all five per protocol.

Mike Trout OWNER-level BvP vs Ureña (32 PA, shrunk 0.831, LOTS_OF_HISTORY) in LAA@TB is the strongest individual opposing-BvP signal on today's slate; amplifies D-grade dual-signal-against concern and supports DOWNGRADE on TB direction.

5/28 lesson reinforced: CHC@STL has Hoerner (shrunk 0.854, 8 PA SMALL_SAMPLE) and Happ (shrunk 0.846, 17 PA OWNER) vs Pallante — 2 OWNER-level batters in the top-5 against the pick-side SP is a structural risk amplifier; combined with near-zero bullpen gap and D-grade, this tips toward CHC direction over STL's speculative bullpen-flip.

ATL @ CIN.reasoning: Negative edge (-5.75pp) generates HARD CAP 1; HARD CAP 10 fires on 51.5% bottom-bucket. Pre-cap score=2 (B) reflecting PQI confirms and Stage 1/2 agreement, but the edge constraint is non-negotiable. ATL's Albies is OWNER vs Holmes (11 PA, shrunk 0.795) but Acuña and Harris are suppressed (shrunk 0.621, 0.600). CIN's Suárez shows 3 HR in 6 PA vs Paddack (noise, but shrunk 1.072 is notable). No qualitative case overrides negative-edge SKIP enforcement.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 1 EV-protective on negative edge
HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket without positive market alignment

SD @ WSH.reasoning: Pre-cap score=0 (C) reflects PQI against WSH (-4.4) without any F-signal firing. Giolito (SD veteran) vs Schultz (WSH newer arm); no BvP data for either side. No qualitative basis to deviate from the natural C-grade SKIP.
lessons_applied: C-grade with no F-signal and PQI-against insufficient to stake
HARD CAP 10 bottom-bucket confirmation

MIN @ PIT.reasoning: Jared Jones (PIT home) has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date — hard stop per thin_sp_data protocol. SP quality for the home starter is completely unquantifiable. Protocol validated across every PENDING game in recent archive (5/26 CHC@PIT: PIT won 12-1 after PENDING correctly prevented pick on Wicks' 0-pitch start).

BOS @ CLE.reasoning: F5_bullpen_gap=+0.79 and F3=1456.6 both support CLE; PQI confirms pick (+6.2). Pre-cap score=7 (A); HARD CAP 7 fires at hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0098 (near-zero, reducing score 7→1). CONFIRM prevents CAP 10 from firing, keeping score at 1 (B-). Edge +4.34pp in staking range. 5/25 lesson: minimum-threshold CAP 7 firing (+0.014) can still produce losses. Treat as lowest-conviction stake-down candidate; the F5 bullpen signal (+0.79) is the primary support despite the marginal HL gap.
lessons_applied: HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold: confirms but low conviction (5/25 WSH@CLE lesson)
F5_bullpen_gap as corroborating signal when HL gap is minimal

LAA @ TB.reasoning: D-grade (-2): SP edge 0.96 xERA against TB (LAA's Martinez holds the advantage over Ureña, 13.48% K-rate) AND PQI against TB (-8.2). D-grade dual-signal-against pattern archives ~60% directional failure rate. confidence_downgrade=True, acute_roster flags compound the concern. Edge +1.75pp prevents any stake. Direction is suspect; DOWNGRADE TB.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against ~60% directional failure rate (post-5/25 archive)

CHC @ STL.reasoning: D-grade (-3): Shota Imanaga (CHC, elite) holds SP advantage over Pallante; Stage 1/2 disagree massively (f5_full_delta=0.294) but hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0023 (near-zero) means the STL bullpen-carry thesis has negligible quantitative support. CHC has 2 OWNER-level batters vs Pallante: Hoerner (8 PA, shrunk 0.854) and Happ (17 PA, shrunk 0.846). 5/28 lesson: 2 OWNER-level batters with ≥14 PA can overcome elite SPs. Edge +22.31pp outside staking range. Near-zero bullpen gap undermines the massive Stage 1/2 divergence. DOWNGRADE STL.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against with SP edge + Stage 1/2 disagree (5/20–5/21 pattern)

NYY @ OAK.reasoning: Bullpen-carry thesis: f5_full_delta=0.3514 (OAK/Severino dominates F5 at 58.43%, NYY wins full game at 76.71%) with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0143 (NYY HL pen materially better). Per 5/26 lesson (NYY@KC, delta=0.205, gap=-0.0175, 15-1 NYY win): large f5_full_delta + negative hl_gap = bullpen-carry conviction, NOT a reversal signal. F2_xwoba_gap=0.025 and F5_bullpen_gap=+0.45 confirm NYY lineup and pen edge. Edge +17.12pp and model_prob=0.7671 outside calibration range = SKIP for staking. CONFIRM NYY direction.
lessons_applied: 5/26 NYY@KC validation: large f5_full_delta + negative hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap = bullpen-carry conviction

ARI @ SEA.reasoning: D-grade (-3): George Kirby (SEA, elite ace) holds 1.52 xERA advantage over Gallen (ARI) AND PQI against ARI is -29.9 — the largest magnitude opposing-pick PQI signal on today's slate. f5_full_delta=0.2452 with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0128 technically matches the bullpen-carry pattern, but PQI -29.9 is an overwhelming late-game headwind that negates the thin bullpen edge. No BvP data. D-grade dual-signal-against at maximum PQI magnitude = clear DOWNGRADE on ARI direction.
lessons_applied: D-grade dual-signal-against: Kirby 1.52 xERA + PQI -29.9 largest opposing signal on slate
